title: Extra Wood Things
description: Adds 2 new Wood Types and Chests, Bookshelves and Ladders to Vanilla Woods
body:
Adds Dried Crimson and Dried warped wood types. These are obtained by smelting Crimson and Warped Stems respectively.
Both of which have Doors, Bookshelves, Ladders, Chests, Log(stem), Wood, Planks, Stripped, Trapdoors, and Boats.

 

Also adds Chest, Bookshelf and Ladder variants for all Vanilla Wood Types.

 

 

 

 

 
Textures by [Quark Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark)
